title: Katalogizační záznam
description: Záznam v datovém katalogu popisující jednu datovou sadu či datovou službu.

language.title: language
language.description: A language used in the textual metadata describing titles, descriptions of the metadata record.

qualified_relation.description: Odkaz na popis vztahu s jiným zdrojem.

date_updated.title: date updated
date_updated.description: Date on which the resource was changed.

date_created.title: date created
date_created.description: The date on which the metadata record was created.

conforms_to_standard.title: conforms to standard
conforms_to_standard.description: An established standard to which the metadata record conforms.
